releaseNotes:
Release v0.11.0

New Features:
- Godot 4 integration (PS-126): editor bridge plugin with a Succession bottom panel, live-apply settings, test connection, command server status reporting, and 16 triggers + 15 actions covering scenes, assets, project settings, GDScript execution, and headless export
- Throttle Event action (PS-177): new Flow Control node that rate-limits events on a graph path - Drop mode discards excess events, Queue mode trickles bursts through at the configured rate without loss
- Photoshop Execute (batchPlay) and Play Action nodes (PS-170)
- New DCC integrations now appear automatically in existing settings files instead of only in fresh installs

Bug Fixes:
- Export Photoshop Document reported success even when the save failed on the Photoshop side (missing folder, save error); it now waits for the plugin response and gains a timeout parameter and On Error output (PS-176)
- List Operations "create" ignored the Value parameter and only wrapped whatever arrived on the Execute input; it now builds the list from Value (JSON arrays parsed, scalars wrapped) with input as fallback (PS-175)
- File pickers on macOS grayed out every file (behaving like a folder browser) because a wildcard extension filter was passed literally; affected five nodes (PS-173)
- Parameters connected to a data wire rendered the "Connected" sentinel as a number value or a checked checkbox; checkboxes also now accept the same truthy values (1, "yes", "true") the backend accepts (PS-26)
- Filesystem access gating no longer rejects plain values that aren't paths at all (comparison strings, exit codes) - real paths outside the allowed roots are still denied
